title: 3 Paranormal Events We Can't Explain

segments.text: Thousands report seeing shadow people at night.
But their existence remains hotly debated.
First, the Hessdalen Lights, unexplained glowing orbs in Norway.
They appear regularly, yet no scientific explanation exists.
Next, the Chupacabra sightings across the Americas.
Livestock disappear, but no consistent evidence remains.
Finally, the Mothman of Point Pleasant, seen before disasters.
He warned of calamities, yet vanished without a trace.
Are these encounters real or psychological?
Follow for mysteries we still can't explain.

description: The unknown world of the paranormal keeps us guessing. Follow for daily mysteries! 👻
